item.title: Donald Trump threatens higher tariffs after accusing Canada over ‘unacceptable’ wildfire smoke
item.description: Heavy smoke has blanketed much of the nation with the president kicking off a bitter war of words over ‘willful negligence’.

item.title: Can you spot an AI deepfake? Researchers say they can train people to tell what is real and what is not
item.description: Images created by artificial intelligence are harder to detect than many believe. Here is what you need to look out for.

item.title: Sideline brawl erupts in Wallabies coach Joe Schmidt’s big farewell victory over Italy
item.description: The referee dished out a red card as the Aussies’ second-worst coaching tenure ended on a high.

item.title: Aussie underdog Lucas Herbert pulls off miracle shot to remain in British Open hunt
item.description: ‘I think that’s the best shot I’ve ever hit.’

item.title: Rory McIlroy slams Bryson DeChambeau for ‘performative’ antics after penalty drama
item.description: Rory McIlroy has accused Bryson DeChambeau of ‘holding the tournament hostage’ in an attention-seeking act.

item.title: Aussie basketball coach Sandy Brondello cops WNBA ban for using common footy term
item.description: ‘I regret that my words caused hurt to a community I respect so deeply.’

item.title: ‘Horrible’ discovery as anti-Indian content spreads on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: An Indian-Australian engineer started documented racist abuse online, with disturbing results.

item.title: Is Facebook down?: Social media website Facebook suffers major global outage on desktop devices
item.description: Thousands of Facebook users have been blocked from accessing their accounts on the social media network’s desktop website.

item.title: Australian expert tells how to navigate grief after loss
item.description: Four months after saying goodbye, Mel Schilling’s husband Gareth posted a touching tribute.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife’s Scarlett opens up about online bullying after Dylan leaves the show with Ally
item.description: Scarlett revealed the secret WhatsApp group that has helped her through the harsh criticism.

item.title: Verdict in as Justin Bieber’s ‘haunting song’ brings down World Cup half-time show
item.description: The Super Bowl-style performance took over the final but one superstar ‘completely killed the mood’.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife’s Yvonne leaves before Jarrad reveals final choice Brodie
item.description: ‘It felt more strategic.’

item.title: Papua New Guinea spotted at airport with rugby union code-swapper Joey Manu
item.description: Joey Manu has been out of the NRL since 2024 but a shock return could be on the cards.

item.title: Bali tattoo spelling blunder leaves Australian tourist red-faced
item.description: It took eight hours to get the ink etched across his chest — but there was one cringe-worthy mistake.

item.title: Football world turns on Argentina for ‘disgusting behaviour’ after World Cup defeat to Spain
item.description: Lionel Messi is his team’s only player who hasn’t been slammed for ‘embarrassing’ post-match antics.

item.title: Queensland family welcomes ‘one-in-15-million’ identical quadruplets
item.description: The naturally conceived birth is so rare doctors believe it may be an Australian first.

item.title: The Open 2026: Report claims Bryson DeChambeau wanted Donald Trump's help in rules drama
item.description: The American was handed a two-shot penalty during the second round.

item.title: Family of allegedly murdered Australian woman Meaghan Bowler fight to bring children home
item.description: ‘Meaghan can no longer fight for her children, so we will fight for her.’

item.title: Australian dementia patient backs World Health Organisation recommendations on how to halve cases
item.description: The World Health Organisation revealed almost 50 per cent of cases could be prevented with everyday lifestyle changes.

item.title: Barnaby Joyce dog interview: One Nation MP snaps in interview with ABC’s 730
item.description: One Nation’s star recruit bookended his day with fiery TV appearances.

item.title: Shocking footage captures dramatic at-sea brawl between Philippine sailors and Chinese Coast Guard
item.description: The violent encounter resulted in a Philippine sailor suffering a severe cut to his head.

item.title: Outpouring of love as football icon Kevin Keegan dies aged 75 after cancer battle
item.description: ‘The former player and manager was surrounded by his wife and daughters ​in his final moments.’

item.title: Man charged with murdering former British MP and reality TV star Ann Widdecombe
item.description: The conservative activist was found dead at her home following a brutal attack.

item.title: Trump imposes 50 per cent tariff on Canadian imports citing ‘discriminatory treatment’
item.description: The US president’s bold move threatens to reignite a trade war.

item.title: Robbie Williams shoots down viral World Cup video with cheeky response
item.description: The UK singer was appearing on a live broadcast when a white object dropped onto his microphone.

item.title: Julie Goodwin’s simple coconut streusel cake is the ultimate winter afternoon tea treat
item.description: The MasterChef favourite shares her simple recipe for a moist coconut cake finished with a golden streusel topping and served with thick cream.

item.title: Derryn Hinch’s final bombshell: Funeral reveals secret Bette Midler fling
item.description: ‘The only thing history owes the dead is the truth.’

item.title: Dave Hughes responds to claim by NZ comic Melanie Bracewell he urinated in her glass at comedy show
item.description: Dave Hughes has found himself in lukewarm water over this hilarious feud with a fellow comedian.

item.title: Who says ice cream is just for summer? Jacob Leung’s winter flavours will change your mind
item.description: Skip the supermarket tub and make your own with Jacob Leung’s sticky date and gingerbread ice cream recipe.

item.title: Cummins, Starc, Hazlewood, Lyon reunited after summer of injury as Aussies name squad to face Bangladesh
item.description: Australia have got their star bowling quartet back together but the toughest call was at the top of the order.

item.title: Duncan Lu’s Vietnamese pho hot pot is the ultimate winter family meal
item.description: Why Duncan Lu says Vietnamese pho hot pot is the comforting winter meal that brings everyone together.

item.title: Sarah Di Lorenzo’s healthy take on Erling Haaland’s viral kebab pizza
item.description: Sarah Di Lorenzo is giving three celebrity recipes a healthy makeover.

item.title: Middle East war: Yemen’s Houthi rebels declare blockade of vital Gulf strait as conflict spreads
item.description: The ‘eye-for-an-eye’ move could send fuel prices soaring.

item.title: Celebrate World Lamington Day with Steph De Sousa’s classic lamington recipe
item.description: Celebrate World Lamington Day with homemade lamingtons.

item.title: Norway’s Prince Haakon shares update after Princess Mette-Marit discharged from hospital following lung transplant
item.description: Princess Mette-Marit has been battling chronic lung disease since 2018.

item.title: Australian footwear brand FRANKIE4 recalls Amara heels over defect linked to fall risk
item.description: ‘Incidents of the heel detaching without warning have occurred.’

item.title: Bentley: 16-year-old boy in custody after his mum found dead, sister seriously injured in suspected WA family violence homicide
item.description: The teen’s sister is also in hospital with serious injuries.

item.title: Sydney Sweeney, Scooter Braun in Australia as actress films new Netflix series Gundam
item.description: There is one detail that has everyone talking after the Euphoria star recently went public with her relationship.

item.title: British singer Jessie J shares ‘difficult’ life update just months after beating breast cancer
item.description: ‘This is the easiest way to let people know the truth, before rumours circulate.’

item.description: ‘This is THE image of this World Cup.’

item.title: Holly Morton-Bowles and Bianca Jones: Foreign Minister Penny Wong presses Laos over backpacker methanol poisoning deaths
item.description: Penny Wong has expressed disappointment over Laos failing to press serious charges.

item.title: Mother and family friend die as husband and children escape blaze in Kingston
item.description: A neighbour said the home was engulfed in flames within minutes.

item.title: Woman allegedly raped by Yung Filly after Perth show tells court ‘he was my idol’
item.description: A young woman allegedly sexually assaulted by a UK entertainer has told a court the rapper was her hero.

item.title: TV star Georgie Parker leads push to protect vulnerable Australians from winter viruses, including RSV
item.description: One of country’s most familiar faces is leading a push to make sure older Australians are prepared.

item.description: ’You were tricked and I kinda think this is just the beginning.’

item.title: Joshua Kerry: Murdered ex-UK minister Ann Widdecombe was struck with hammer 21 times, London court told
item.description: Ann Widdecombe was eating lunch when the alleged attack unfolded.

item.title: Former child star Kaylee Hottle dies age 18 in horror car crash
item.description: The deaf actor was best known for her starring role in two ‘Godzilla’ films.

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump says US will strike Iranian nuclear site Pickaxe Mountain ‘soon’
item.description: It comes after the deaths of US soldiers just days into the conflict reigniting.

item.title: Ryanair: Man sucked out of plane window, Ljubisa Karović, details ‘explosion’ moments before flight terror
item.description: A passenger who was half sucked out of a plane window has spoken about the terrifying ordeal for the first time, saying the mid-air emergency haunts him.

item.title: US war in Iran has cost $A53 billion so far, Hegseth confirms in Senate grilling
item.description: The Secretary of War told a Senate hearing in Washington the figure included anticipated costs through to September.

item.title: Australia’s ‘Doctor Jihad’ found alive in Iraqi Prison years after suspected death alongside ISIS troops
item.description: He was presumed to have been killed during a bloody battle in Syria almost a decade ago.

item.title: Teen boy charged after mother killed and sister critically injured
item.description: The 16-year-old boy will face court on Wednesday over the ‘suspected family violence homicide’.

item.title: Yellowstone National Park: Uproar as ‘oblivious’ tourists filmed committing dangerous act at natural landmark
item.description: Two tourists have caused outrage after they risked their lives and jail time at an iconic natural wonder.

item.title: Mystery solved: Plane wreck found after crash that killed dozens 74 years ago
item.description: A vintage Pan Am plane that went missing in 1952 has been found after a seven year search.

item.title: Housing minister steps in as Queensland quadruplet mum loses government rental assistance
item.description: The housing minister stepped in after the family were told they were not eligible due to the GoFundMe donations.

item.description: ‘It’s obvious from a personal point of view for Izak, it may be something.’

item.description: The One Nation MP said his dog got ‘under his skin’ during the interview.

item.description: The video shows sparks flying from the fuselage as the plane tried to land at a US airport.

item.description: Five months after the Iran conflict sent fuel prices soaring, many households have no plans to go back.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Nina Kennedy to be flag bearer for Australia and Tim Hodge baton bearer at Commonwealth Games
item.description: When asked what would it mean to lead the team out, she had only three words on her mind.

item.title: Shades of Ariarne Titmus as Aussie teenage sensation Sienna Toohey set for tilt at Commonwealth Games gold
item.description: The 17-year-old shares an ‘ironic’ similarity with one of Australia’s greatest ever.

item.title: Ukraine hits more warehouses of Russia’s top online retailer ‘Wildberries’
item.description: Dramatic footage circulating online shows huge plumes of smoke rising into the air from the blast sites.

item.title: Middle East war: Donald Trump salutes four killed US soldiers as Iran conflict reaches tipping point
item.description: The service members were killed during a recent reignition of conflict between the US and Iran.

item.title: Xpeng says Tesla, not BYD, is its real rival
item.description: A massive push from Xpeng Australia with new models and more dealers isn’t a quest to overtake Chinese pin-up brand BYD in the sales race.

item.title: AFL footy boss Greg Swann brings own vision to explain controversial stand rule
item.description: ‘Some people are losing their minds over things that they shouldn’t lose their minds over.’

item.title: Children’s slide at new Toggerai Park in Appin shut after man hospitalised
item.description: The slide was given the tick of ‘approval’ by the planning minister, but it has since been sealed shut.

item.title: Greek court rejects Australia’s request to extradite James Dalamangas
item.description: A legal loophole has allowed one of Australia’s most wanted men to avoid extradition.

item.title: Tasmania Devils strike Ken Hinkley campaign issue and delete promo page
item.description: The new club has quickly hit the delete button after the unexpected problem came out of nowhere.

item.title: Job cuts looming for 35 major Australian companies as inflation and AI constrict economy
item.description: The report claims inflation and AI are putting a number of industries on shaky ground.

item.title: 2027 Nissan Z prices: Manual Nismo, chassis and tech upgrades incoming
item.description: The updated Nissan Z will arrive Down Under in September, headlined by a manual option for the Nismo, as well as new dampers and personalisation options.

item.title: The Odyssey: Elon Musk claims Grok AI platform will make a more ‘accurate’ film than Christopher Nolan
item.description: The trillionaire declared the film will be ‘historically accurate and true to the art of Homer’.

item.title: China cuts tax breaks as bigger, heavier EVs strain its roads, transport budgets
item.description: The trend towards larger, heavier vehicles in China has prompted a rethink of EV tax concessions amid concerns they're contributing to road wear while reducing revenue for road maintenance.

item.title: Hawthorn re-signs tall forward Mitch Lewis amid chase for Gold Coast Suns star Ben King
item.description: The pieces of the puzzle are falling into place but a son of a gun remains in limbo.

item.title: Escalator mishap rattles Labor conference as Albanese unveils major workplace reforms
item.description: The prime minister narrowly avoided a fall before kicking off the conference.

item.title: Wayne Bennett tears to shreds special Latrell Mitchell contract clauses: ‘Terrible idea’
item.description: ‘I’m not interested in that.’

item.title: New warning for Ozempic, Wegovy and Mounjaro over serious eye disorder including blindness
item.description: The regulator said no treatment has been shown to improve the condition once it develops.

item.title: Thousands of Victorian teachers strike in Melbourne over rejected pay deal
item.description: Teachers say the dispute is about more than just money, demanding better conditions, higher pay for support staff, less time spent in meetings, and smaller class sizes.

item.title: Chery Stockman ute attracts over 5000 expressions of interest, 1000 deposits
item.description: Chery Australia says it has seen strong early demand for its Stockman, which will be the first diesel plug-in hybrid ute on the local market.

item.title: Sydney greyhound track Wentworth Park to be demolished for housing and parklands months early
item.description: ‘Wentworth Park belongs to the public, not an industry that kills dogs as a hobby.’

item.title: US military launches attacks on Iran for 12th straight night as civilian infrastructure threatened
item.description: The US military launched its latest wave of attacks following an ominous threat from the president.

item.title: Melbourne Storm superstar Cam Munster in talks over bombshell move to PNG Chiefs
item.description: ‘We have been in constant communication with Melbourne.’

item.title: 2027 Toyota Tundra facelift brings Australian Old Man Emu suspension
item.description: Toyota's full-size pickup gets a design refresh, cabin upgrades and a new Trailhunter variant featuring suspension from Australia's Old Man Emu.

item.title: Man flees after crashing car with baby and two others into truck near Toowoomba
item.description: The driver allegedly fled into farmland, leaving three passengers including an 11-month-old behind.

item.title: Subaru drops e-Boxer mild hybrid for Toyota hybrid tech
item.description: The Japanese brand is dropping its original mild-hybrid system as it shifts its focus to Toyota-based full-hybrid and electric vehicle technology.

item.title: Restaurant offers huge reward for help finding thieves that stole donation jar for employee
item.description: A donation jar intended to go to a sick employee of the restaurant was among the items stolen.
